subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。右人差し指で左手のひらの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin from Position 1. With the right index finger, pick up the palm string on the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左親指で、左小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With the left thumb, pick up the near little-finger string on the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指で左親指向こうの糸を取り、人差し指の糸が外れないように親指で押さえます
subtitle.en: With the left index finger, pick up the far thumb string on the left hand, and hold it down with the thumb so the index-finger string does not slip off.

subtitle.ja: 左親指手前側の2本の糸を右手で持ち、左手から全ての糸を外します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the two near strings on the left thumb and remove all strings from the left hand.

subtitle.ja: 左人差し指がかかっていた輪に左小指を、左小指がかかっていた輪に左親指を入れ、右手を離します
subtitle.en: Insert the left little finger into the loop that had been on the left index finger, insert the left thumb into the loop that had been on the left little finger, and release the right hand.

subtitle.ja: 左手で同じ操作を繰り返します(2回目)
subtitle.en: Repeat the same action with the left hand (second time).

subtitle.ja: もう一度左手で同じ操作を繰り返します(3回目)
subtitle.en: Repeat the same action once more with the left hand (third time).

subtitle.ja: もう一度左手で同じ操作を繰り返し(4回目)、左人差し指の糸を左親指で押さえた状態で完成です
subtitle.en: Repeat the same action once more with the left hand (fourth time), and finish with the left thumb holding down the string on the left index finger.

subtitle.ja: 右人差し指の糸を外して両手を開くことで、赤ちゃんが産道を通って産まれて行きます
subtitle.en: Remove the string from the right index finger and open both hands, and the baby passes through the birth canal and is born.
